profile.name: Arthur Pan
profile.headline: Software Development Engineer
profile.summary: Software development engineer focused on AI applications, backend systems, full-stack platforms and education technology. Experience spans Python/Django data pipelines, React/Node.js platforms, multi-agent AI tutors, RAG retrieval, LLM evaluation, high-concurrency ID generation and payment/booking systems, with a combined research and engineering background.

contact_note: Currently based in Pittsburgh, US — reachable by email or phone.

education.degree: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence and Innovation
B.E. in Electronics and Computer Science (First Class Honours)

bullets: Built 13 RESTful APIs and data pipelines with Python, Django and PostgreSQL to ingest, store and manage customer-support queries.
Implemented JWT authentication through custom Django middleware, with Redis and Celery for session caching, token blacklisting and TTL expiration.
Refactored the customer-support service into a layered Controller-Service-Repository architecture with Adapter pattern support for heterogeneous data sources.
Instrumented Prometheus + Grafana health monitoring and maintained 98% pytest coverage across auth, adapters, LLM services and API endpoints.
Core engineer on TutorMesh, a React, TypeScript and Node.js web platform for tutor search, booking, messaging and Stripe payments.
Hardened booking and payment reliability with Stripe idempotency keys, optimistic locking for time-slot reservation and webhook retry reconciliation.
Implemented a high-concurrency ID generator with segment prefetching from MySQL and local caching to reduce database round trips.
Developed a multi-agent Socratic AI tutoring platform with Java and Spring AI, coordinating a supervisor and five specialized sub-agents.
Integrated Chroma vector store for course-material retrieval and per-student memory recall, improving retrieval hit-rate by 81% through an LLM-as-judge pipeline.

projects.name: GraphRAG Knowledge Assistant
projects.description: Neo4j graph construction, hybrid retrieval, entity linking, re-ranking and LLM synthesis.

projects.name: Multi-Agent Code Review Bot
projects.description: LangGraph tool calling, AST parsing, static analysis, GitHub webhooks and structured output.

projects.name: Mini-GPT Pretraining from Scratch
projects.description: Byte-pair encoding, multi-head attention, RoPE, KV-cache and mixed-precision training.

publications: G. Pan, et al. A Cost-Benefit Analysis of On-Premise LLM Deployment: Breaking Even with Commercial LLM Services. IEEE Big Data.
S. Ashraf, J. Malamut, ..., G. Pan, et al. EduCoder: An Open-Source Annotation System for Education Transcript Data. ACL 2026.
